violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of wing sauce and a cooked prime rib in the walk in cooler were not dated.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of paper towels were stored on the floor in the back stockroom.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. A bag of corn meal was left open in the middle stockroom.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. An open bag of corn meal was stored on the floor in the middle storeroom.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of dinner napkins was stored on the floor under the stainless steel counter by the dish area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the walk in cooler under the storage shelves need to be cleaned.
